name: Ellen's Chocolate Expresso Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Grease a 9-inch spring-form pan. Place wax paper on the bottom of the pan and grease and flour it; set aside.
3. In the top of a double boiler, heat butter, sugar, and Espresso until sugar dissolves.
4. Pour hot liquid over chocolate and stir until dissolved. Set aside to cool slightly.
5. Beat eggs and yolks in a bowl until frothy. Add the egg mixture to the chocolate mixture and pour into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 1 hour, or until edges are cracked but center is still slightly jiggly.
7. Turn off heat and remove from oven. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool fully.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
9. Remove from the pan, garnish with confectioners' sugar, and serve small thin slices.
Note: This rich, flourless cake is almost as creamy as cheesecake. For Passover, use a Passover cake meal to dust the pans instead of flour.
